page.title: My Profile
page.subtitle: Manage account info and your VibeRepo library

account.name: Name
account.auto_on_title: ON — auto-generates CPS + PRD after a meeting.
account.auto_off_title: OFF — only CPS is automatic. You trigger PRD / Design step by step.
account.auto_on_hint: On meeting upload, CPS + PRD run automatically. Fast flow.
account.auto_off_hint: Review each step's result, then advance yourself (CPS → PRD → Design).
account.auto_on_toast: Auto analysis ON — CPS + PRD auto-generated after a meeting.
account.auto_off_toast: Review mode ON — only CPS is automatic; you trigger PRD/Design.
account.github_oauth_missing_title: OAuth not set up — contact your admin
account.github_oauth_admin: The admin hasn't configured GitHub OAuth yet.
account.github_disconnect_msg: Disconnect your GitHub account? From your next login you can only sign in with email/password.
account.google_oauth_admin: The admin hasn't configured Google OAuth yet.
account.google_disconnect_msg: Disconnect your Google account? From your next login you can only sign in with email/password or GitHub.
account.notion_connect_title: Connect with a Notion Internal Integration token
account.notion_disconnect_msg: Disconnect your Notion workspace? You won't be able to import Notion pages until you reconnect.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.intro: Every device you're currently signed in on. End any lost or shared device immediately.
sessions.revoke_message:
End the session on "{device}" right now?

That device will need to sign in again on its next request.
sessions.revoke_all_message:
End all {count} sessions other than this device?

Lost devices and shared PCs will be signed out automatically.

team.title: Teams
team.empty: No teams yet. Create one or wait for an invite.
team.pro_required_html: Teams require a Pro plan or higher.
team.pro_required_toast: Teams require a Pro plan or higher.
team.delete_confirm: Delete team '{name}'? Its team projects will be deleted too.

notion_dialog.title: Connect Notion workspace
notion_dialog.oauth_intro: Grant Notion workspace access in one step. You'll go to Notion's consent page → choose a workspace → select pages → return automatically.
notion_dialog.oauth_hint: Note: only pages you grant to "Harness" in your Notion workspace are accessible. The token is encrypted with Fernet before storage.
notion_dialog.fallback_summary: OAuth not working? Connect with an Integration Token
notion_dialog.token_guide_title: Create an Internal Integration Token — Notion guide
notion_dialog.step2_html: Click + New integration → name it "Harness" + choose "Access token" as the auth method
notion_dialog.step3_html: Select the installable workspace, then "Create integration"
notion_dialog.step5: On each Notion page to import, open "..." → "Add connection" → select Harness
notion_dialog.oauth_missing_banner: OAuth isn't set up in production. Please connect using the method below.
notion_dialog.token_hint: Note: the token is encrypted with Fernet before storage. Only pages where you've added the connection are accessible.
notion_dialog.oauth_503_error: OAuth isn't set up in production yet. You can connect with an Integration Token below.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.lead: All data tied to your account will be permanently deleted. Please decide carefully.
danger.item_account: Account info (email, name, GitHub · Google · Notion connections)
danger.item_mcp: Issued MCP tokens — all active, expired, and revoked records
danger.item_projects: Meeting logs, PRD, Design, and all project data
danger.callout_html: This cannot be undone. You can sign up again with the same email, but existing data won't be recovered.
danger.confirm1_message:
Are you sure you want to delete your account? Your account + library + subscription history will all be permanently deleted.

This action cannot be undone.
danger.confirm2_message: Last check. Your account and all data will be deleted. You can sign up again with the same email, but existing data won't be recovered.
danger.deleted_toast: Account deleted. Thank you for using our service.

library.title: VibeRepo library
library.empty_hint: Add GitHub repositories you use often to pick them quickly on the Lint/Code pages.
library.url_invalid: That's not a valid GitHub repository URL.
library.url_duplicate: This repository is already in your library.

usage.title: Usage
usage.reset_today: Resetting today — usage will clear shortly.
usage.choose_tier: Choose a plan to upgrade to
usage.lite_hint_unlimited: Even after your main tokens run out, you can keep working on the Lite model (unlimited).
usage.lite_hint_soft: After your main tokens run out, work continues on the Lite model (within a weekly limit).
usage.lite_nudge: High usage today. If this is for commercial use, please check our Enterprise plan.
